audit_question: Is Tier II inventory review current?

description: Facility hazardous chemical inventory is reviewed for EPCRA Tier II reporting thresholds. products=SupplyArr,LoadArr,ReportArr; entities=site,chemical_inventory; value_type=boolean; operator=equals; expected_value=true; evidence_kind=system_fact; required_document_type=none; retention_period=annual_or_site_change; failure_severity=major; automatic_failure=false; override_allowed=true.

label: Reportable release escalated
description: Potential reportable releases are escalated for CERCLA/EPCRA notification review. products=AssurArr,MaintainArr,ReportArr; entities=incident,release; value_type=boolean; operator=equals; expected_value=true; evidence_kind=product_record; required_document_type=none; retention_period=per_incident; failure_severity=critical; automatic_failure=true; override_allowed=false.
